file_insights.purpose: Public API barrel export for user module
key_aspects: Centralized exports for all user module functionality
Well-organized into logical sections (Module, Service, Repository, Controller, Routes, Types, Schemas)
Comprehensive type exports covering all CRUD, profile, role, and event types
Includes utility functions and type guards for user objects
Defines module as core system component
Declares 8 events (created, updated, deleted, status.changed, role.assigned/removed, profile.updated, password.changed)
Lists 6 lifecycle hooks (beforeCreate, afterCreate, beforeUpdate, afterUpdate, beforeDelete, afterDelete)
Defines 9 permissions (read, create, update, delete, profile operations, role operations, status update)
Tier-based feature set from free to enterprise
Default settings for password requirements, email verification, session management
Routing-controllers based JsonController
Uses dependency injection with tsyringe
Implements authorization decorators (@Authorized)
Comprehensive CRUD endpoints with proper HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
Separated concerns: list, profile (self), read, create, update, delete, role management, status management
Proper error handling via BaseController
Uses QueryParams, Body, Param decorators for input validation

file_insights.purpose: Business logic layer for user operations
key_aspects: UserService class with comprehensive CRUD methods
Methods: list, get, create, update, delete, getProfile, updateProfile, changePassword, getRoles, assignRole, removeRole, changeStatus, inviteUser, listSummaries
Integration with UserRepository for data access
Event emission for all state changes
Hook execution (beforeCreate, afterCreate, beforeUpdate, afterUpdate, etc.)
Proper error handling and validation
Password hashing and security considerations

file_insights.purpose: Data access layer for user persistence
key_aspects: Generic repository pattern implementation
Methods: find, findById, create, update, delete, findPaginated, search, filterByStatus, filterByRole
PaginatedResult type for list operations
CreateUserData and UpdateUserData type definitions
Database query optimization with proper indexing considerations
Transaction support for data consistency
userRoutes array defining all REST endpoints
Path builder functions: buildUserApiPath, buildUserAdminPath
isProtectedUserRoute utility for authorization checks
userEndpoints object for centralized endpoint references
UserRouteConfig and UserEndpointMetadata type definitions
Route protection levels and permission mappings
Base field schemas: emailSchema, passwordSchema, nameSchema, phoneSchema, urlSchema, cuidSchema
CRUD operation schemas: createUserSchema, updateUserSchema, updateProfileSchema, changePasswordSchema, etc.
Query and filter schemas: userListQuerySchema
Response schemas for safe user serialization
Helper functions: isValidEmail, validatePassword, normalizeName, getFullName, getInitials
Zod input type exports for TypeScript integration
Validation rules: password strength, email format, name normalization

file_insights.purpose: TypeScript type definitions for user module
key_aspects: Core entity types: User, SafeUser, UserWithRelations, UserRoleInfo, UserProfile
Request/Response types for all operations (Create, Update, Profile, Password, Role, Status, Invite)
List operation types: UserListFilters, UserListParams, UserSummary
Event types for state changes (UserCreatedEvent, UserUpdatedEvent, etc.)
Hook context types for lifecycle hooks (BeforeCreateContext, AfterCreateContext, etc.)
Module settings type: UserModuleSettings
Type guards and helper functions: isUser, isSafeUser, toSafeUser, toUserProfile
Comprehensive JSDoc documentation for all types
UserModule class with initialization logic
Dependency injection setup (register services, controllers, repositories)
Event emitter configuration
Hook management (register lifecycle hooks)
Settings validation and initialization
Module context and state management
UserModuleContext and UserModuleHooks interfaces

patterns_discovered.description: Clear separation of concerns: Controller -> Service -> Repository -> Database
patterns_discovered.implementation: UserController delegates to UserService which uses UserRepository

patterns_discovered.description: Centralized public API through index.ts with organized sections
patterns_discovered.implementation: index.ts exports all public types, functions, and classes grouped by concern
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clean imports, prevents circular dependencies, easy API surface management

patterns_discovered.description: Runtime schema validation combined with TypeScript types
patterns_discovered.implementation: Zod schemas for all inputs with derived TypeScript types
patterns_discovered.benefit: Type safety at compile time and runtime validation

patterns_discovered.description: State changes emit events for async processing and integration
patterns_discovered.implementation: Module emits 8 different events (created, updated, deleted, etc.)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Loose coupling, audit trail capability, extensibility

patterns_discovered.description: Pluggable hooks at key lifecycle points
patterns_discovered.implementation: beforeCreate, afterCreate, beforeUpdate, afterUpdate, beforeDelete, afterDelete
patterns_discovered.benefit: Extension points without modifying core logic, custom logic injection

patterns_discovered.description: Routes include metadata about endpoint protection and access
patterns_discovered.benefit: Centralized route information, easier security audits

patterns_discovered.description: List endpoints return paginated results with metadata
patterns_discovered.implementation: PaginatedResult<T> with data, page, perPage, total, totalPages
patterns_discovered.benefit: Scalable list operations, client-side pagination support

patterns_discovered.description: Different types for internal (User) vs external (SafeUser) representation
patterns_discovered.implementation: User with password hash vs SafeUser without sensitive fields
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents accidental exposure of sensitive data

patterns_discovered.description: Module configuration via module.json with schema validation
patterns_discovered.implementation: Declarative module metadata, tier-based features, settings with defaults

gotchas_discovered.description: Must ensure password hashes are never returned to clients via SafeUser type
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: SafeUser type excludes password field, use toSafeUser() helper for serialization

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Circular dependency between auth and user modules
gotchas_discovered.description: User module depends on auth module for verification, auth may depend on user for validation
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: module.json declares auth as dependency, establish clear interface contracts

gotchas_discovered.description: All user operations are scoped to organization via middleware, no global user queries
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: UserController uses @CurrentOrg() decorator, routes protected with org context

gotchas_discovered.description: Email must be unique per organization (multi-tenant), not globally unique
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Repository constraints should include org_id, validation in schema context-aware

gotchas_discovered.description: Assigning roles requires role to exist in role module first
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: assignRole method should validate role existence before assignment

gotchas_discovered.description: Users could potentially delete themselves or last admin of org
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: delete() method should check user isn't deleting self and maintain minimum admins

gotchas_discovered.description: beforeCreate hooks run before validation, afterCreate after database commit
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document hook execution order, ensure atomicity with transactions

gotchas_discovered.description: Module doesn't appear to handle password reset flows, only change-password
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document that reset flows handled by separate auth module

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully implemented comprehensive user module with full CRUD, role management, and profile functionality
key_achievements: Complete REST API with 15 endpoints covering all user operations
Proper separation of concerns across controller, service, repository, and types layers
Runtime validation via Zod schemas with TypeScript type derivation
Lifecycle hooks at 6 key points for extensibility
Safe user serialization preventing sensitive data exposure
Comprehensive type definitions with full JSDoc documentation
Module metadata in module.json with tier-based features
test_coverage_indicators: All types are exported for testing imports
Schemas can be used for test data validation
Repository has clear data access methods for mocking
Service business logic separated for unit testing
Controller delegates to service for easy mocking
documentation_quality: Comprehensive JSDoc comments on all public functions
Type definitions include detailed parameter descriptions
Module.json clearly declares dependencies and provided features
Example usage patterns in index.ts comments
Endpoint descriptions in controller with request/response examples

recommendations.recommendation: Implement rate limiting on authentication-critical endpoints (change-password, login attempts)
recommendations.rationale: Password change and login endpoints vulnerable to brute force attacks

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test suites for all CRUD operations and edge cases
recommendations.rationale: User module is core system component, requires extensive test coverage

recommendations.recommendation: Document permission model and role assignment flow in detail
recommendations.rationale: Complex permission system needs clear guidelines for developers

recommendations.recommendation: Add email verification flow with token management
recommendations.rationale: module.json mentions requireEmailVerification setting but implementation may be incomplete

recommendations.recommendation: Implement user invitation workflow with token-based activation
recommendations.rationale: inviteUser endpoint exists but invitation flow not fully documented

recommendations.recommendation: Create specific error types for user module exceptions
recommendations.rationale: Better error handling and client-side error recovery

recommendations.recommendation: Add database indexes for common query patterns (email, organization, status)
recommendations.rationale: List queries with filters will benefit from strategic indexing

recommendations.recommendation: Add audit logging for sensitive operations (role changes, status changes, deletions)
recommendations.rationale: Compliance and security monitoring of user modifications

recommendations.recommendation: Document integration points with auth, organization, and role modules
recommendations.rationale: Multi-module dependencies need clear interface contracts

recommendations.recommendation: Add migration scripts in lifecycle folder for database schema initialization
recommendations.rationale: lifecycle/ folder referenced in module.json but implementation unclear
